# Alpha: On Effective Lorentz Invariance in Superfluid Analogs

Author: Test Author A
Year: 2023

## 1. Introduction

This is a tiny test document. It mentions Bogoliubov excitations explicitly
so section search tests can find them.

## 2. Background on Superfluid Vacuum Theory

SVT posits that spacetime emerges from a superfluid-like background.
The Bogoliubov spectrum governs low-energy excitations. We also cite
[volovik2003] here.

## 3. Conclusions

We have not actually done anything.

## References

Volovik, G. (2003). The Universe in a Helium Droplet.

Liberati, S. (2013). Tests of Lorentz invariance: a 2013 update.
